Terms of Service Privacy Policy Warrant Canary ChangeNOW Support

Powered by ChangeNOW.io liquidity infrastructure. We don't collect personal data. Privacy by default.

Terms of Service

Welcome to MoneroSwap. By using our service, you agree to the following terms:

1. Nature of Service

MoneroSwap is a non-custodial cryptocurrency exchange platform. We do not hold your funds; we facilitate the exchange between different digital assets through specialized infrastructure.

2. No-KYC Guarantee (Level 0)

Universal Privacy Commitment: MoneroSwap will NEVER request Know Your Customer (KYC) documentation, identity verification, or personal information from its users. Our service is designed to be purely transaccional and identity-free.

3. User Responsibility

You are solely responsible for providing the correct wallet addresses. Transactions on the blockchain are irreversible, and we cannot recover funds sent to the wrong address.

4. Risk Acknowledgment

Digital assets are highly volatile. By using this service, you acknowledge and accept the market risks and the potential for financial loss.

5. Lawful Use

You agree not to use MoneroSwap for any illegal activities. Users are responsible for complying with their local regulations.

Privacy Policy

At MoneroSwap, your privacy is our highest priority. We have designed our platform to collect the minimum amount of data necessary.

1. No Personal Data

Since we do not collect personal data, we have nothing to sell or share with third parties, advertisers, or government agencies.

2. Zero Logs Policy

Our backend proxy is configured to never log IP addresses, user agents, or metadata associated with your swap requests. Your connection remains private.

3. No Cookies

MoneroSwap uses zero cookies and zero local tracking mechanisms. We do not use Google Analytics or any third-party tracking scripts.

4. Localized Assets

All assets (fonts, icons, scripts) are served directly from our infrastructure to prevent IP leaks to third-party CDNs or font providers.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is MoneroSwap?

MoneroSwap is a non-custodial, privacy-focused cryptocurrency exchange designed to be a "Privacy Shield" for your transactions.

Is it really anonymous?

Yes. We use a private Node.js proxy that strips your IP address and metadata before communicating with liquidity providers. Combined with our No-Logs policy, your identity is fully protected.

What is the "Level 0" Guarantee?

It is our commitment that we will never, under any circumstances, stop a transaction to request identity documents (KYC). We believe financial privacy is a fundamental human right.

Do you use cookies?

No. We use zero cookies and zero trackers. Every time you visit the site, you are a completely new user to us.

How long does a swap take?

Most transactions are completed within 10-30 minutes, depending on the network speed of the assets being swapped.

Support MoneroSwap

MoneroSwap is an independent project dedicated to financial privacy. Your donations help us maintain infrastructure.

Donate Monero (XMR)
